{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323151521DE0B4CE81F8F0BA8ED7B"}"},"total":278},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7052364764588049188","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"从开始追到现在，我认为这是我看过的最好看的男频爽文了，有时候男主三观很正都让我一个女生都忍不住鼓掌了，就是希望这不是后宫文（虽然目前小亮亮还没有表示出喜欢谁），但毕竟有这么多漂亮美丽的女孩纸啦是我我也把持不住啦hhh，最后希望作者大大继续加油噢^O^"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1642006635,"group_id":"6972548492937923592","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"海压竹枝低复举，风吹山角晦还明","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzX3MfKqk/IRwR/GRglzt8v9CrDMqaDU1hNlqJz3/51j","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ab09793e7aef452eadfe2259fd950185~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792339&x-signature=Sfm%2FAV9H7sv3aClPm9MTf3EVq1Q%3D","user_id":"4208583628556606","user_name":"星星呀～❤"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4208583628556606","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1743930532,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6972548492937923592","book_info":{"abstract":"从学霸到学渣，只需短短三月！
